rationale: Provenance/decomposition lens across the merged branch @21374bb8. Cross-walked every spec AC1-AC13 to its bead home and shipped proof; each maps to exactly one bead's proof and matches the plan Provenance table. Compound AC1/AC6/AC7 legitimately span the substrate/gate edge per the plan legend (completion-owner = later bead). No AC dropped, none double-authored. Bead-2 NoCommitsNoBeads assertion change (now 'plan bead list could not be read', FinalizeEpic uncalled) is the sanctioned R3/AC6 spec-mandated tightening per consolidated-round-1.md, closing the pre-existing missing-plan-WITH-commits hole; comment truthful; cleanup path preserved. Build/test(4 pkgs)/vet/gofmt clean; negative fences 0-hit; gitutil byte-unchanged; sole workflow claimant. git clean (only this review dir untracked).
